---
title: "Thales Maia, PhD"
pagetitle: "Thales Maia"
description-meta: "Quarto Academic Website Template adapted by Dr. Gang He"
image: "files/images/foto.jpg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - text: "{{< ai lattes >}} Lattes"
      href: http://lattes.cnpq.br/8637504941507702
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed, you also need to install the fontawesome extension
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7943-6322
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Thales-Maia
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com.br/citations?user=7oeMSpAAAAAJ&hl=pt-BR&oi=ao
      target: _blank
    - text: '<img src="files/icons/somos-plus.png" style="height: 1.1em; vertical-align: -0.2em; margin-right: 0.3em;"> UFMG'
      href: https://somos.ufmg.br/professor/thales-alexandre-carvalho-maia
      target: _blank
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/thales-maia-38755a23
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/thalesmaia
      target: _blank
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/@thalesmaia6607
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:thalesmaia@gmail.com
listing:   # Recent news and events
  - id: recent-news
    contents: 
      - pages/news
    exclude:
      title: "Notícias e Eventos"
    type: table
    # type: grid             # Mudamos para grid para permitir itens lado a lado
    # grid-columns: 4        # Força a ter exatamente 2 colunas
    max-items: 6           # Mostra até 6 notícias com scroll
    # page-size: 4           # Garante que a "página" tenha apenas 4 itens
    fields: [image, date, title]
    sort-ui: false     # Remove a caixa "Order By"
    filter-ui: false   # Remove a caixa "Filter"
    # max-description-length: 75
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
      

  - id: recent-blog
    contents:
      - pages/blog
    exclude:
      title: "Blog"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    page-size: 3
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"

  - id: recent-portfolio
    contents:
      - pages/portfolio/pd
      - pages/portfolio/industria
    exclude:
      title:
        - "Projetos de P&D"
        - "Indústria"
    type: grid
    max-items: 15
    page-size: 15
    fields: [image, title, description]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
---

:::{#hero-heading}
**<span class="lang-pt">Desenvolvo tecnologia para o setor industrial | Projeto de Máquinas Elétricas, Geração de Energia &amp; Automação | Professor</span><span class="lang-en">I develop technology for the industrial sector | Electrical Machine Design, Power Generation &amp; Automation | Professor</span>**

<span class="lang-pt">Belo Horizonte, Minas Gerais, Brasil</span><span class="lang-en">Belo Horizonte, Minas Gerais, Brazil</span> <img src="files/icons/flag_minas.svg" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.1em; border: 1px solid #999;"> <img src="files/icons/flag_brasil.svg" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.1em; border: 1px solid #999;">

<span class="lang-pt">Desenvolvo tecnologia para o setor industrial, com foco em máquinas elétricas, geração de energia e automação. Sou especialista no projeto de geradores e motores customizados, além da instrumentação de processos industriais — criando soluções para operação remota, IIoT e Indústria 4.0.</span><span class="lang-en">I develop technology for the industrial sector, focusing on electrical machines, power generation, and automation. I specialize in designing custom generators and motors, as well as industrial process instrumentation — creating solutions for remote operation, IIoT, and Industry 4.0.</span>

<span class="lang-pt">**Professor**</span><span class="lang-en">**Professor**</span>, Universidade Federal de Minas Gerais (UFMG)

<div style="margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 40px;">
  <img src="files/icons/dee.jpg" style="height: 45px; margin-right: 15px; vertical-align: middle;" alt="Departamento de Engenharia Elétrica">
  <img src="files/icons/logo_UFMG.jpg" style="height: 45px; vertical-align: middle;" alt="Universidade Federal de Minas Gerais">
</div>


<!-- ## Notícias e Eventos -->
## <span class="lang-pt">Notícias</span><span class="lang-en">News</span>
<!-- Acompanhe as últimas &nbsp;[Notícias](pages/news/index.qmd#category=news)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[Eventos](pages/news/index.qmd#category=event)&nbsp;, e &nbsp;[Mais »](pages/news/index.qmd) -->

::: {#recent-news}

:::

<p align="right" style="margin-top: -1rem;"><span class="lang-pt">[Ver todas »](pages/news/index.qmd)</span><span class="lang-en">[See all »](pages/news/index.qmd)</span></p>
<!-- <p align="right">[Todos as Notícias »](pages/news/index.qmd)</p> -->

:::

## Blog
<!-- Confira os últimos &nbsp;[Artigos](pages/blog/index.qmd)&nbsp; e &nbsp;[Mais »](pages/blog/index.qmd) -->

::: {#recent-blog}

:::

<p align="right"><span class="lang-pt">[Ver Todos »](pages/blog/index.qmd)</span><span class="lang-en">[See all »](pages/blog/index.qmd)</span></p>

## <span class="lang-pt">Portfólio</span><span class="lang-en">Portfolio</span>

::: {#recent-portfolio}

:::

<p align="right"><span class="lang-pt">[Ver Todos »](pages/portfolio/index.qmd)</span><span class="lang-en">[See all »](pages/portfolio/index.qmd)</span></p>

### <span class="lang-pt">Clientes e Parceiros</span><span class="lang-en">Clients &amp; Partners</span>

{{< include /files/includes/_partners.qmd >}}

<script src="/files/scripts/portfolio-carousel.js"></script>
